name: bls-oews-mcp
description: MCP server for BLS Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS). Market wage data for IGCE development and price analysis.
long_description:
Queries BLS OEWS data covering approximately 830 occupations across 530+ metro areas. Returns employment counts, mean/median wages, and full percentile distributions (10th/25th/50th/75th/90th) at national, state, and metro levels.

7 tools. Optional BLS API key raises the ceiling to 500 queries/day via the v2 API. Without a key, the server falls back to v1 at 25 queries/day.

Hardened across 6 audit rounds with 218 regression tests (31.1 per tool). 22 findings fixed including 12 response-shape crash paths surfaced in mock fuzzing. Round 6 added 153 live-gated tests covering 30 SOC codes, 14 states, 15 metros, all 9 datatype codes, and concurrent-call patterns. Zero new bugs found in round 6 - validates depth of prior hardening.

bls_api_key.title: BLS API Key
bls_api_key.description: Free API key from https://data.bls.gov/registrationEngine/. Unlocks the v2 API at 500 queries/day. The v1 fallback (25/day, no key) is too limited for real IGCE work.
